persona.theftStory: A travel company used my destination photos in their brochure. When I called they hung up on me.

answers.q1_tell_me_about_your_art: I shoot Wildlife mostly. Been doing it for 17 years. Started as a hobby and it just took over my life. I have built up a solid portfolio on Pic-Time, iStock and use Capture One, Darktable, Photoshop for my workflow.
answers.q2_how_did_you_get_into_this: I started as a hobbyist during the pandemic. Lockdown gave me time to learn and suddenly I had a portfolio and clients.
answers.q3_best_thing_this_year: My photo won a regional competition. Validation that I am on the right track.
answers.q5_how_did_that_make_you_feel: Furious. Absolutely furious. I spent hours on those shots - planning, shooting, editing - and someone just right-clicked and saved. It is theft, plain and simple.
answers.q6_what_do_you_worry_about: The sheer volume. I cannot monitor the entire internet. Every day more sites scrape and repost content. It is overwhelming.
answers.q7_magic_wand_fix: A community-driven system where photographers watch out for each other. Like a neighborhood watch but for stolen photos.
answers.q8_what_do_you_currently_do: Honestly? Watermarks on some images. That is it. I know it is not enough but I do not have time for anything else. Running a business takes all my energy.
answers.q9_time_money_spent: I tried three different monitoring services last year. Spent about 600 total. Cancelled two because they did not catch anything useful.
answers.q10_whats_worked_what_hasnt: Posting lower resolution images online helps but clients want to see quality. It is a catch-22.
answers.q11_free_all_in_one_tool: Depends on the setup. If it takes 5 minutes I am in. If it requires migrating my entire workflow I will pass.
answers.q13_if_found_stolen_art: Calculate damages based on licensing rates. Then give me a demand letter template to send. I want to be paid.
answers.q14_tell_a_friend: I would be measured. I found this tool for protecting our photos. It is free and seems legit. Not perfect but better than nothing.
answers.q16_what_moves_number_up: If it has a mobile app. I am on my phone more than my computer these days.
answers.q17_anything_else: I would pay for this if it worked. The fact that it is free makes me both excited and nervous.
